title: View AGV Status Details Using The Get AGV Status Pop-Up
summary: Open the Get AGV Status pop-up from the AGV API Controls area of the System HMI and review the per-AGV details shown there, including battery status, command status, error codes, and AGV state.
when_to_use: Use this procedure when you need to view AGV status details from the System HMI API screen and confirm what battery status, command status, error codes, and AGV state are currently displayed for each AGV.
not_for: Do not use this procedure to interpret whether displayed AGV values are normal or abnormal, because the source does not define acceptable ranges or expected values for the displayed fields.
Do not use this procedure to change AGV state or perform AGV recovery actions.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Open the AGV API Controls area, launch the Get AGV Status pop-up, and review the displayed AGV details.

safety_notes: This source-supported procedure is a status-viewing activity only.
The source does not define normal versus abnormal values for battery status, command status, error codes, or AGV state.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the System HMI API screen
AGVs section of the API screen

access_required: Access to the System HMI API screen
system_preconditions: The AGVs section of the API screen is available.
The GET AGV STATUS function is available from the AGV API Controls area.
external_references: Figure 4-13 Get AGV Status Pop-Up Screen

visual_references.description: AGV API Controls screen showing the AGVs section of the API screen and related AGV controls.
Get AGV Status pop-up screen showing the AGV details display.
ACB API screen used to access system, AGV, and tote controls.

steps.title: Open the AGVs section of the API screen
steps.purpose: Navigate to the AGV controls area where the GET AGV STATUS function is available.
steps.instruction: Open the AGVs section of the API screen in the System HMI.
steps.expected_result: The AGV API Controls area is visible and the GET AGV STATUS option is available.
steps.healthy_condition: The AGVs section of the API screen is displayed.
steps.failure_condition: The AGVs section of the API screen cannot be accessed or the GET AGV STATUS option is not visible.

actions.label: Open AGVs section
actions.exact_action: Open the AGVs section of the API screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The AGV API Controls area and the location of the GET AGV STATUS option.
The API screen used to access AGV controls.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if the AGVs section of the API screen cannot be opened.
Stop or escalate if the GET AGV STATUS option is not available.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Figure 4-12, titled AGV API Controls, appears on page 40... The section also states that GET AGV STATUS opens AGV details including battery status, command status, error codes, and AGV state.

steps.title: Click GET AGV STATUS
steps.purpose: Open the AGV status pop-up so the per-AGV details can be reviewed.
steps.instruction: Click GET AGV STATUS in the AGV API Controls area to open the status pop-up screen.
steps.expected_result: The Get AGV Status pop-up opens.
steps.healthy_condition: A pop-up screen appears with details about each AGV.
steps.failure_condition: The GET AGV STATUS pop-up does not open.

actions.label: Open AGV status pop-up
actions.exact_action: Click GET AGV STATUS to open the status pop-up screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The GET AGV STATUS control in the AGV API Controls area.
The pop-up screen that should appear after clicking GET AGV STATUS.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if the GET AGV STATUS pop-up does not open.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Clicking GET AGV STATUS pops up a screen with details about each AGV, including battery status, command status, error codes, and the state of each AGV.

steps.title: Inspect the AGV details shown in the pop-up
steps.purpose: Confirm that the pop-up is displaying the documented AGV detail fields for each AGV.
steps.instruction: In the pop-up, inspect the details shown for each AGV.
steps.expected_result: The pop-up displays the documented AGV detail fields for each AGV.
steps.healthy_condition: Battery status, command status, error codes, and AGV state are displayed in the pop-up.
steps.failure_condition: The expected AGV details are not displayed.

actions.label: Inspect AGV detail fields
actions.exact_action: In the pop-up, inspect the details shown for each AGV.

steps.purpose: Review the battery status field shown for each AGV in the pop-up.
steps.instruction: Check the battery status shown for each AGV.
steps.expected_result: Battery status is visible for each AGV listed in the pop-up.
steps.healthy_condition: A battery status value or indicator is displayed for each AGV.
steps.failure_condition: Battery status is missing for one or more AGVs.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Clicking GET AGV STATUS pops up a screen with details about each AGV, including battery status, command status, error codes, and the state of each AGV.

success_criteria: The Get AGV Status pop-up opens from the AGV API Controls area.
The pop-up displays per-AGV battery status, command status, error codes, and AGV state for review.
healthy_conditions: The AGVs section of the API screen is accessible.
The GET AGV STATUS pop-up opens successfully.
Battery status, command status, error codes, and AGV state are displayed for each AGV.
failure_conditions: The GET AGV STATUS pop-up does not open.
The expected AGV details are not displayed.
One or more of the documented fields—battery status, command status, error codes, or AGV state—are missing.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the GET AGV STATUS pop-up does not open.
Escalate if the expected AGV details are not displayed.
Escalate to a higher support level or SME if interpretation of displayed values is required, because the source does not define normal versus abnormal values for the displayed fields.

The source does not provide estimated completion time.

The source does not provide commands, thresholds, or interpretation guidance for the displayed AGV fields.
